ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Gene sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the gene sequence */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression data entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment or condition */,
  "log2FC" REAL /* Log2 fold change in expression */,
  "x_mean" REAL /* Mean expression level in condition x */,
  "y_mean" REAL /* Mean expression level in condition y */,
  "pval" REAL /* P-value of the statistical test */,
  "padj" REAL /* Adjusted P-value */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Quality control status */,
  "normalization_method" TEXT /* Normalization method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment or condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or intervention in the experiment */,
  "design" TEXT /* Experimental design */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Experimental platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment or condition */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the analysis */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm or tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the gene's expression change */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the effect size */,
  "pval" REAL /* P-value of the statistical test */,
  "padj" REAL /* Adjusted P-value */,
  "fdr" REAL /* False discovery rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., GO term, pathway) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "inherited" INTEGER /* Whether the permission is inherited from a parent dataset or analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the pathway information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pathway */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the gene in the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_memberships_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_memberships_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
